				let appLink = '';

				let isApple = /iPhone|iPad|iPod/i.test(navigator.userAgent);
				let isAndroid = /Android/i.test(navigator.userAgent);

				if (isApple){
					appLink = appleLink;
				}else if(isAndroid){
					appLink = androidLink;
				}

				let mobile_max = window.matchMedia("(max-width: 767px)");
				let $banner = $("#app_banner_wrap");
				let $dismiss = $("#app_modal_dismiss");

				if( appLink && mobile_max.matches && readCookie('mobile_app_banner') !== 'off' ){

					$("body").addClass('has_app_banner');
				}else{
					$banner.remove();
				}

				$dismiss.on('click',function (){
					removeBanner();
				})

				$banner.on ("keydown", function (e) {
					if (e.keyCode == 27) {
						removeBanner();
						return false;
					} // escape

					return true;
				}); // keydown

				function removeBanner(){
					$banner.remove();
					createCookie('mobile_app_banner','off');
					$("body").removeClass('has_app_banner');
				}

			}); 
		})(jQuery);

<script>

    (function($) {
        $(document).ready (function () {
            var $overlay = $("#pop_ext_link, #pop_ext_link_wrap");
			var $contents = $("#leftbar-search, #pagefull-locall, .adobe-download-text,#main-locations > div:not([id])"); //any siblings of pop_ext_link
			var accept = $("#accept_ext_link");
			var cancel = $("#cancel_ext_link");
			var lastLink = null;

			$(".external_link").on('click', function (e){
				e.preventDefault();

				lastLink = $(this);
				var tagName = this.tagName;
				var url = $(this).attr('href');
				if( tagName !== "A" ){
					var url = $(this).find('> a').attr('href');
				}

				openOverlay($overlay);

				accept.off('click');
				accept.on('click',function openLaCountyLink (e){
					if( url ){
						window.open( url, "_blank" );
					}
					dismissModal(e);
				})
			})

            $overlay.on("click", dismissModal );
            cancel.on("click", dismissModal );


            function dismissModal(e){
                if(e.target.id === "pop_ext_link" || e.target.id === "pop_ext_link_dismiss" || e.target.id === "cancel_ext_link" || e.target.id === "accept_ext_link"){
					e.stopPropagation();
					$contents.attr('aria-hidden', false);
                    $overlay.css('opacity', 0);
                    setTimeout(function (){
                        $overlay.hide();

                        if (e.screenX == 0 && e.screenY == 0) {
							lastLink.focus();
                        }

                    }, 400);
                    $contents.attr('aria-hidden', false);
                }
            }

            $overlay.on("keydown", function(e) {
                var $buttons = $overlay.find(":enabled, a");
                var first = $buttons.first()[0];
                var last = $buttons.last()[0];

                if(e.keyCode == 27) {
                    $overlay.find(".close").click();
                    return false;
                } // escape

                if(e.keyCode == 9) {

                    if(!e.shiftKey && e.target == last) {
                        $(first).focus();
                    }else if(e.shiftKey && e.target == first) {
                        $(last).focus();
                    } else {
                        return true;
                    } // if

                    return false;
                } // if tab

                return true;
            }); // keydown


            function openOverlay($overlay) {
				$contents.attr('aria-hidden', true);
                $overlay.show(0, function() {
                    $overlay.css('opacity', 1);
                    $overlay.find("button").first().focus();
                }); // show

            } // openOverlay

        }); // ready


    })(jQuery);
    </script>
